title: Senate Votes to Fill Seat of Air Safety Official Ousted by Trump
author: Karoun Demirjian
fullText: John DeLeeuw, an American Airlines executive, was confirmed to the seat vacated by Alvin Brown, who is suing over his ouster.
summary: John DeLeeuw, an American Airlines executive, was confirmed to the seat vacated by Alvin Brown, who is suing over his ouster.
